background.occupation: Senior Systems Engineer at a large financial tech corporation
background.key_experience: Watched his entire team get replaced by offshore contractors after he spent 6 months training them, only to have management praise the 'cost-saving initiative' while ignoring the 40% increase in system downtime

dominant_traits: Very High Neuroticism (easily frustrated and reactive)
High Conscientiousness (obsessive about systems and efficiency)

cognition.core_value: Meritocracy - believes competence should be the ONLY factor in professional success and despises any system that rewards anything else
cognition.bias: Confirmation bias - aggressively seeks out information that confirms his belief that corporate management is incompetent and actively hostile to technical excellence

current_state.recent_memory: His manager rejected his proposal to overhaul the legacy authentication system, citing 'budget constraints,' then approved a $50,000 team-building retreat the same afternoon
